-InMrc         : 
  1. Input MRC file that contains single image or a stack of
     frames. In the latter case, CTF will be estimated for 
     each fraome.

-OutMrc        
  1. Output MRC file that contains the averaged
     amplitude spectrum.
  2. If the input is a stack of frames, the output will be
     a stack of spectra, one for each frame.

-OutCtf        
  1. Output text file containing the estimated ctf parameters
     one line per tilt image.

-AngFile       
  1. Input text file that contains a single column for tilt
     angles. The order must match the images in the input
     MRC file.
  2. Optional. When not given, the output CTF file will not
     have columns for tilt angle.

-TiltRange     
  1. Min and max tilt angles of the tilt series if it is
     collected with a fixed tilt step.

-kV            
  1. High tension in keV.

-Cs            
  1. Spherical aberration Cs in mm

-AmpContrast   
  1. Amplitude contrast, default 0.07.

-PixSize       
  1. Pixel size in A.

-ExtPhase      
  1. Extra phase shift and search range in degree.

-LogSpect      
  1. Calculate logrithmic spectrum. It is not enabled      by default.

-InSuffix      
  1. Image or tilt series with their file names ended with the
     specified suffix will be loaded for CTF estimation.
  2. In this case, -InMrc and -InSuffix are jointly used to
     to screen files for CTF estimation.

-Serial        
  1. Enale serial CTS estimation where there are multiple files
     to be processed.
  2. -Serial 1 enables serial processing.

-Gpu
  GPU ID. Default 0.
  # Not in --help for whatever reason
